header.subtitle: HOW IT WORKS
header.title: Effortless Clean, Every Time
header.description: Book using our app in just a few taps, and enjoy a spotless home without lifting a finger.

items.title: Guest Mode
items.description: Book your cleaning in just a few taps - simple, fast, and hassle-free.

items.title: All Services in One Place
items.description: Find cleaning, AC service, pest control and more — all from the app.

items.title: Choose Way to Pay
items.description: Pay you way - bWallet, ABAKHQR, card, or cash on delivery. Every payment is secure, so you can book with confidence.

items.title: Easy Rescheduling
items.description: Change your booking in seconds without hassle.

items.title: Pick Date & Time
items.description: Choose a slot that works for you — morning, afternoon or evening.

items.title: Trusted Cleaners
items.description: Rate and choose our top-rated professionals for consistent results.
